task: Owner login UI Sign In button fix
rootCause: The owner-mode login screen's main 'Sign In' button called Supabase email/password auth directly, which failed because the typed password did not match the Supabase-stored password. The backend passwordless owner login endpoint was already working, but the UI was not using it for the primary button.

fix.change: In owner mode, the main 'Sign In' button now routes to the backend passwordless owner login endpoint (/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login). The backend self-heals the password and mints a real Supabase session. The typed password is ignored in this path. Button label changed to 'Owner Sign In'.

nextStep: Reload the app in Expo Go (or restart the dev build) to receive the updated bundle. Then open Owner Login, type iperez4242@gmail.com, and tap 'Owner Sign In' — no password required.
